heading_content_part: Additionally, interactions that you perform on the website can be stored for your next visit.Cookies cannot be used to launch programs or to transfer viruses to devices. Based on the information contained in cookies, we can facilitate website navigation and correctly display the website.In no case will we pass this data to third parties or link it with your personal data without your specific consent.

decoder_heading: Additionally, interactions that you perform on the website can be stored for your next visit

heading_content_part: Of course, you can also view our website without cookies. Common browsers are configured to accept cookies by default. You can change this behavior in the settings of your browser. Please refer to the documentation of your browser for instructions. Please keep in mind that some functionality on our website will not work when you have disabled cookies.

decoder_heading: Google Analytics uses cookies to allow an analysis of your usage of this website
ident_heading: Google Analytics uses cookies to allow an analysis of your usage of this website
heading_content_part: Google Analytics uses cookies to allow an analysis of your usage of this website. The information generated by this cookie is usually transmitted to a Google server in the USA and stored there. Due to the activation of IP anonymization on this website, if you are within the member states of the European Union or in other contracting states of the agreement, your IP address will be truncated by Google before being transmitted to the USA. Only in exceptional cases, the full IP address will be sent to a Google server in the USA and truncated there. On behalf of the operator of this website, Google will use this information to evaluate your use of the website, compile reports on website activity and provide other services related to website activity and internet usage to the website operator. The IP address your browser provides as part of the usage of Google Analytics will not be connected to other Google data.

decoder_heading: Google Analytics uses cookies to allow an analysis of your usage of this website
ident_heading: Google Analytics uses cookies to allow an analysis of your usage of this website
heading_content_part: Our website uses Google conversion tracking. If you reached our website via an ad served by Google, Google AdWords will set a cookie on your device. This cookie is valid for 30 days and is not used to personally identify you. If you visit specific pages of our website and the cookie is still valid, both Google and we can detect that you reached that website after clicking on the Google ad. Every Google AdWords customer receives a different cookie, so the cookie from this website cannot be used to track you on websites of other AdWords customers. The information gathered using the conversion cookie is used to generate statistics for us. We can access the total number of users that clicked our ad and were redirected to a page with the conversion tracking tag. We do not receive information that would allow us to identify you personally.
